overall.description: A stationary nighttime camping scene from a video game, showing a crackling campfire with rising smoke and a canvas tent pitched in a grassy forest clearing. The warm firelight illuminates the immediate area while the surrounding forest and cloudy night sky remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest campsite with campfire and tent

agents.ego_description: sitting stationary at the campsite, observing the campfire and surrounding forest

entered.detail: burning fire with flickering flames providing warm orange illumination
brown canvas A-frame tent pitched on the grass
rising smoke drifting upward from the campfire into the night sky
dense pine trees silhouetted against the dark sky
golden-brown grass covering the forest floor around the campsite

segments.scene_description: A static view of a nighttime campsite in a forest clearing. A campfire burns brightly in the center, casting warm light on the surrounding dry grass and canvas tent to the right. Smoke rises steadily from the fire while the dark silhouettes of pine trees frame the background under a partly cloudy night sky. No movement occurs except for the natural flickering of flames and rising smoke.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a secluded nighttime campsite nestled within a dark forest clearing. It begins with a focused view of a brightly burning campfire, where flickering orange flames cast a warm, pulsing glow across the surrounding dry grass. As the light dances, the camera captures the steady ascent of smoke drifting upward toward a partly cloudy night sky. The scene remains anchored in this stillness, framing the soft texture of a nearby canvas tent against the imposing, dark silhouettes of pine trees that enclose the perimeter.
